OVERLAY_HOOK_1: Delay does not protect your vision from premature failure, it guarantees a slower and quieter atrophy.
OVERLAY_HOOK_2: You are not confused about what to do, you are afraid of what obedience will cost you to actually do it.
OVERLAY_HOOK_3: The question is not whether delay is your strategy, it is whether you have the courage to name it as fear.
